---
description: "Record accessibility test results in the test matrix. Quick command to mark tests as passed, failed, or note who tested them."
mode: "agent"
agent: "a11y-test-tracker"
---

Record accessibility test results in ACCESSIBILITY-TEST-MATRIX.md.

The user will provide:
- Which issue(s) to update (by number or sprint)
- Which testing categories passed or failed (SR, KB, LV, ZR, AX, VR)
- Who tested and the date

If the user didn't specify all of these, ask before proceeding.

{{input}}
